{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322051312FD9B0218459E073D1643"}"},"total":6151},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7430720199128138520","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，双向奔赴，除了没有标题之外，其他都很好，有些人写这类书会在校园里再给他整一个女二学姐，其实这类单女主的书有的时候并不需要女二，因为有的时候女二如果表现的太好，会让人觉得很可惜","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"双向奔赴","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774127592073D1643%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227430720199128138520%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227409177156867066904%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730104876,"group_id":"7409177156867066904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"富士山头扬汉旗，樱花树下醉胡妾。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzVahYvSsj9xFypwwChPOvU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bda896ab9b884ac08d45fe15998e7a05~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702732&x-signature=cJajseYkCrGMaTmfHTunFwNqX8U%3D","user_id":"303934720446968","user_name":"笑撸狸猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"303934720446968","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7409177156867066904","book_info":{"abstract":"【男频单女主】【病娇财阀】【爽文】【甜宠】【复仇】【虐渣】【强制爱】【*短剧已上线】【短剧撕夜，2重生美女开启的追爱之旅，3她的权柄即我刀锋，一共3版改编短剧】
前世林然被女友联合家人害死，而一直把他当玩物的病娇女财阀却帮他手刃仇人。
看着病娇女财阀与自己躺在同一口棺材殉情，林然才知道他错的多么离谱。
重活一次，他放弃渣女校花，转身投入病娇女财阀怀里。
“阿然！如果把你的眼睛挖出来做成标本，你就只能看我了！”
林然：“老婆亲亲！”
“阿然！如果把你的腿打折，你是不是就不跑了？”
林然：“老婆抱抱！”
“阿然！如果……”
林然：“不要说话！老婆爱爱！”
洛瑶：……
看见渣爹：“宰了他！”
看见继母：“宰了她！”
看见弟弟：“宰了它！”
看见白月光：“把它送去东南亚！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f1b10fb810730d316a51e0a29d70f17d","author":"汤姆没有毛","author_id":"","book_id":"7409177156867066904","book_name":"我在病娇女财阀老婆怀里无法无天","book_short_name":"撕夜","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7409178397152133656","read_count":"81144","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1074111"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"538","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,单女主,打脸,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a10761bc77a0fcbe0404ec4882cbcdf1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311592&x-signature=DX1XLnsJD9ZQbt1lJdvV7Ac4YRQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2532882312599655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"121"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322051312FD9B0218459E073D1643"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":31,"forwarded_count":0,"li ten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27509,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":35892},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7486794438856786712","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我在西红柿看完的第一本小说，以前很难静下心来看小说，但是这本书直接抓住了我的心，一口气看完了，并且让我迷上了病娇文。
先说结论，喜欢病娇纯爱的，必看！！！
这本书属于很常规的都市文，屌丝男主遇到霸道女总裁，靠着老婆报仇，然后击败几个敌对家族。但是~~~很爽，一点刀没有~~~看的很舒服~~~（本人接受不了一点刀，我爱作者大大）所有正派角色都有一个几乎完美的结局，而且作者的描写文笔也很棒，我最近还读了一本差不多剧情的病娇文，虽然都是9分以上，但是感觉这本书描写的更好，情节更完善，逻辑更清晰一点，不会让人产生担忧“下一章主角会不会被刀啊”看这本书只会有“洛瑶一定能轻松解决的[害羞]”那种爽感。
最后的结局也收放有度，既给人无限遐想，又能完美结束整个故事（再多来几个反派家族啊，继续写下去啊哈基毛）
爱看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743160730,"group_id":"7409177156867066904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8WmxhdrvjwcX2Y2HCs1n9vxTqAY1XHUrl+uiAaHKEFd","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a60eae43c8864416bdfa04d23752e9e0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700873&x-signature=uFgBlJLvfwj1tYlZTKs1RdLYCVc%3D","user_id":"4169769001473732","user_name":"双叶理央3"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4169769001473732","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7409177156867066904","book_info":{"abstract":"【男频单女主】【病娇财阀】【爽文】【甜宠】【复仇】【虐渣】【强制爱】【*短剧已上线】【短剧撕夜，2重生美女开启的追爱之旅，3她的权柄即我刀锋，一共3版改编短剧】
